column1: Dataset Title: Russian Arctic Vegetation Archive: Indigirka
Dataset Author: Mikhail Telyatnikov and Elena Troeva

Dataset Reference: Telyatnikov, M. Y., Troeva, E. I., Prystyazhnyuk, S. A., Gogoleva, P. A., Cherosov, M. M., & Pestryakova, L. A. (2015). Vegetation in the lower reaches of Indigirka river (zonal and mountain tundras). Turczaninowia, 18(4), 128–168. https://doi.org/10.14258/turczaninowia.18.4.16
Dataset Table: Species Cover Data for Indigirka

Dataset Notes: Percentage scale is used. Taxa are listed in alphabetical order. Both the dataset author determinations and the current nomenclature according to the Panarctic Species List (PASL) are listed.
